name: aria-knowledge
description: Codex port of ARIA - Applied Reasoning and Insight Architecture. Uses the shared ARIA knowledge folder and config schema while adapting plugin manifests, commands, hooks, review skills, subagent capture, prospect/retrospect nudges, and tool-boundary behavior for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Persistent human-governed knowledge and decision discipline for Codex
interface.longDescription: ARIA gives Codex sessions a persistent markdown knowledge lifecycle: capture, govern, promote, apply, and refresh. This Codex port keeps the Claude-standard knowledge folder schema intact while adapting hooks, commands, prompt-intent surfacing, review skills, subagent capture, and prospect/retrospect automation for Codex tool surfaces.
defaultPrompt: Set up ARIA Knowledge for this Codex workspace
Load ARIA context for this task
Run an ARIA wrapup for this session
